artifacts.title: Ingest Pipeline — Raw Source to Typed Canonical Artifact
artifacts.tldr: Transform a heterogeneous raw source (paper, system prompt, deep research, idea file, tool doc, workflow JSON) into atomic + compiled wiki artifacts via a 9-step ripple workflow: envelope → read → qmd-search neighbors → dedupe → atomic creation → ripple existing artifacts → recompile profiles/playbooks → index/log update → INDEX.json regen.
artifacts.goal: ingest a raw source into a typed canonical knowledge graph

edges.note: Ingest is the write path that enforces the distill-first principle
Pipeline depends on the raw → distilled → compiled separation
Compounding is the OUTCOME of disciplined ingest with ripple updates
Ripple step prevents cross-document insights from being lost across silos
Idea-file mode is one of nine source-mode pipelines

_issues: V2-TLDR-OVERSIZE: 342 chars (max 280)
